title: Andaman Tropical Escapade
shortDescription: Crystal clear waters, pristine beaches, and underwater wonders.
overview: Dive into the azure waters of the Andaman Islands. From the historic Cellular Jail to the spectacular Radhanagar Beach, it's a tropical paradise.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Port Blair
itinerary.description: Visit Cellular Jail and Corbyn's Cove.

itinerary.title: Ferry to Havelock
itinerary.description: Cruise to Havelock Island and relax.

itinerary.title: Radhanagar Beach
itinerary.description: Spend the day at Asia's most beautiful beach.

itinerary.title: Elephant Beach
itinerary.description: Water sports and snorkeling at Elephant Beach.

itinerary.title: Return to Port Blair
itinerary.description: Ferry back to Port Blair, shopping.
